response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the video: The video is entirely spoken by the VTuber Hakui Koyori. She discusses birthday merchandise and future live events. 2. Audio Analysis: No vocal music (songs with lyrics) is played in the background or performed by the VTuber at any point in the video. The audio consists only of voice-over and sound effects related to the presentation. 3. Final Conclusion: The video contains no vocal music, so no lyrics lookup was required. The JSON is constructed based on this finding.
response.global_summary: The video features Hololive VTuber Hakui Koyori, who is celebrating her birthday and announcing a special merchandise set titled "Birthday Commemorative Set 2026." Throughout the video, she promotes various items, including a blanket, a voice keyholder with game-themed lines, a smartphone stand featuring her as a plushie, and a game-themed card holder. She also announces the release of a new song MV and a future "Mengen Live" (face-to-face live event). The video concludes with a celebratory graphic. No vocal music was performed or played in the video.

scenes.description: Hakui Koyori introduces her birthday commemorative goods and talks about the "Birthday Commemorative Set 2026" and upcoming live events.
A static screen showing the "Birthday Commemorative Set 2026" advertisement graphic.
